title: Syuto's custom animations
description: Syuto's animations adds a large variety of custom sword blocking animations from well known clients into Minecraft forge.
body:
This mod is built with customization, aesthetics, and player experience at its core. It introduces a collection of sword-blocking animations inspired by some of the most iconic and beloved Minecraft clients. Each animation has been carefully recreated to deliver smooth transitions, satisfying visuals, and a nostalgic feel that enhances both PvP and casual gameplay.

Whether you prefer the classic blocking style from older clients or more modern, fluid movements, this mod gives you full control over how your sword behaves in combat. Players can easily switch between different animation styles through an intuitive interface, allowing complete personalization of their visual experience.

Beyond just looks, the mod focuses on performance and compatibility. It’s optimized to run smoothly alongside other visual or combat-oriented mods, ensuring you can enjoy enhanced visuals without sacrificing frame rate or stability.

With this mod, players can relive the charm of classic Minecraft PvP while adding a modern touch to their setup. It’s perfect for those who value both style and functionality, offering a refreshing way to make your gameplay stand out. Bring back the feeling of legendary clients—customized, refined, and made for today’s Minecraft experience.
